name: Pad Thai (2)
recipeIngredient: 1/3 lb Flat rice stick noodles (banh pho), 1/4" wide
1/4 lb Pork, cut into matchstick strips
1 cup Bean sprouts, washed and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak noodles in warm water for 60 minutes. Drain and set aside.
2. Prepare all other ingredients and arrange near the wok. Work quickly.
3. In a wok, fry pork in peanut oil over medium heat until half cooked.
4. Add shrimp and garlic; stir. Cook until shrimp and pork are done.
5. Beat egg and add to mixture. Cook, stirring, for about half a minute.
6. Increase heat to high. Add the drained noodles to the shrimp mixture.
7. Add water, vinegar, fish sauce, sugar, shrimp powder, most peanuts,
white pepper, and chili powder. Toss to combine.
8. Let cook on one side (don't stir; keep checking as if a big pancake).
Flip carefully when nearly cooked, about 5-10 minutes total.
9. Add most bean sprouts and scallions. Stir and cook for another minute.
10. Transfer to a plate. Top with remaining sprouts, scallions, and peanuts.
Garnish with coriander and serve with a wedge of fresh lime.
